name: Greek Garlic Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cooked chicken, cut into 3/4-inch cubes
2 cups Peeled, seeded and diced cucumber
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine chicken, feta, olives, parsley, and dried oregano (if using).
2. For the dressing, mix minced garlic with mayonnaise.
3. Stir the dressing into the chicken mixture.
4. Let the salad stand in the refrigerator for 1 hour to develop flavors.
5. Just before serving, fold in cucumber and yogurt.
6. Serve on a bed of lettuce. Serves 4-6.
